summary: Iteration 7 - All tests passed. Verified all user-requested changes: 1) Modal maxHeight 85% for scrollable languages, 2) Language/currency modals use dynamic theme colors (C.bg), 3) Weekend planning removed from work.tsx, 4) Kids stories section translated (isRo → t()), 5) Quick add cleaning/shopping buttons added to checklist with data-testids, 6) All 10 translation files updated with kids stories keys.

issues: Minor: 'shadow*' style props deprecated warnings in console - should use 'boxShadow' (same as previous iterations)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified all user-reported changes: 1) Modal maxHeight increased to 85% so all 12 languages are scrollable, 2) Language/currency modals now use C.bg dynamic color for proper day/night mode theming (no more hardcoded dark LinearGradient), 3) Weekend planning/weekly planning AI item removed from work.tsx, 4) Kids stories section in kids.tsx now uses t() function instead of isRo ternary for stories/generateStory/savedStories labels, 5) Quick add cleaning and shopping buttons with proper data-testids added to organize.tsx checklist, 6) All translation files (it, fr, de, es, pt, pl, ar, uk, ru) have proper kids.stories keys
